response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video from 00:00 to 05:01. 2. Identified only gameplay audio, game effects, and the VTuber's voice. 3. Confirmed no vocal music was playing throughout the duration of the video.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber playing Minecraft, managing inventory, and talking to viewers. There is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: The VTuber plays Minecraft, engaging in inventory management and interacting with the game's economy. There is no vocal music present.
